name: Companhia Energetica do Rio Grande do Norte - COSERN
summary: Companhia Energ√É¬©tica do Rio Grande do Norte - COSERN engages in the distribution and transmission of electricity in Rio Grande do Norte. It serves 167 municipalities in Rio Grande do Norte covering 53 thousand kilometres concession area. The company was founded in 1961 and is headquartered in Natal, Brazil. Companhia Energ√É¬©tica do Rio Grande do Norte - COSERN operates as a subsidiary of Neoenergia S.A.
